scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=tcp SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 100 INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sip:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sip:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=[transport] Supported: replaces, Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0^M o=- 1401971558 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=-^M c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=TIAS:1920000^M t=0 0 m=audio 49152 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 103 BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
